purpose: Formal check result registry. This records actual result status separately from source extraction and check-target definition.

results.result_summary: Implemented finite pre-bracketing/bracketed-tree consistency checker on selected small tree fixtures. The checker verifies that source-stated delete-bracket and contract-minimal-bracket covers generate an acyclic finite poset with antisymmetric transitive closure. This is partial finite evidence only; it does not prove the full Matryoshka face-lattice anti-isomorphism and is not an all-n theorem.

Implemented finite bracketed-tree cover-rule checker on selected small tree fixtures. The checker verifies the source-stated local move split for cosmohedral/bracketed-tree covers: delete a bracket versus contract a minimal bracket. This is partial finite evidence only; it does not complete the full A/M1 comparison burden and is not an all-n theorem.
Check target is defined but SMT/SymPy encoding of delta-domain conventions has not been implemented yet.
Check target is defined but intrinsic-vs-degenerative equality predicate has not been formally encoded yet.

Implemented finite noncrossing-chord face-poset checker for n=4..8. Every cover relation is strict inclusion by exactly one added noncrossing diagonal under rank(face)=number_of_diagonals; max rank matches n-3 for each checked n. This checks the declared finite baseline only, not a Lean theorem.
Check target is defined but sign-vector boundary/descent enumerator is not implemented yet.
Check target is defined but finite curve-intersection/u-equation checker is not implemented yet.
Check target is defined but positive-region/binary-boundary solver check is not implemented yet.
Check target is defined but symbolic shift/transmutation bridge checker is not implemented yet.
Check target is defined but no comparator invariant checker has been implemented yet.
Check target is defined but no typed representation-map comparator has been implemented yet.

Source-extracted claims have source anchors, statuses, and linked formal check targets; every formal check target links back to extracted claims; the 16-paper source manifest and PDF binding registry are present and must be fully covered by extracted claims and repo PDF pointers.

non_promotion_rule: Only PASS results from implemented mathematical checkers may promote a row within the declared finite scope. DEFINED_NOT_RUN is not evidence for the mathematical claim. PASS_PARTIAL_FINITE_CHECK is finite evidence within its declared scope, not theorem status.
